# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  serverName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server
  databaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: startup-db
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Database
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    minLength: 1
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login name
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    minLength: 12
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator password
  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
    metadata:
      description: SKU name for the database (Basic is lowest cost)
  skuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
    metadata:
      description: SKU tier for the database
  enableAuditing:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: >-
        STRONGLY RECOMMENDED - Enable SQL auditing.
        Set to true to enable audit logging. Cost is minimal and
        provides critical security visibility.
  enableThreatDetection:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: >-
        STRONGLY RECOMMENDED - Enable Advanced Threat Protection.
        Helps detect SQL injection, anomalous access patterns, etc.
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: Storage account name for audit logs (required if auditing is enabled)
  securityAlertEmailAddresses:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - security@yourcompany.com
    metadata:
      description: Email addresses for security alerts

variables:
  auditStorageAccountName: "[if(empty(parameters('storageAccountName')), concat('sqlaudit', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)), parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    name: "[parameters('serverName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Disabled
    tags:
      environment: startup
      costCenter: engineering

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('skuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local
    tags:
      environment: startup
      costCenter: engineering

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Redirect

  # --- SECURITY RESOURCES BELOW ---
  # These are parameterized so you can enable/disable them.
  # We STRONGLY recommend keeping them enabled even for cost-conscious startups.

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2022-09-01
    condition: "[parameters('enableAuditing')]"
    name: "[variables('auditStorageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
    tags:
      environment: startup
      purpose: sql-audit-logs

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    condition: "[parameters('enableAuditing')]"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      storageEndpoint: "[if(parameters('enableAuditing'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName')), '2022-09-01').primaryEndpoints.blob, '')]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[if(parameters('enableAuditing'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName')), '2022-09-01').keys[0].value, '')]"
      retentionDays: 30
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/securityAlertPolicies
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    condition: "[parameters('enableThreatDetection')]"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings', parameters('serverName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      emailAddresses: "[parameters('securityAlertEmailAddresses')]"
      emailAccountAdmins: true
      retentionDays: 30

  # Transparent Data Encryption - no additional cost, always enable
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'), '/current')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

outputs:
  serverFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
  auditingEnabled:
    type: bool
    value: "[parameters('enableAuditing')]"
  threatDetectionEnabled:
    type: bool
    value: "[parameters('enableThreatDetection')]"
  securityWarning:
    type: string
    value: "[if(and(parameters('enableAuditing'), parameters('enableThreatDetection')), 'Security features are enabled - good!', 'WARNING: Security features are disabled. Enable them as soon as possible. A single breach can cost far more than these features.')]"
